title: stelis rosamariae
intro: Stelis rosamariae, also known as the orchid Stelis rosamariae, is a type of epiphytic orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is native to Mexico and Central America, and its stems, leaves, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Stelis rosamariae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, among others. Stelis rosamariae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in folk medicine as a remedy for various ailments.
